{{CargoOrgan
|name=Bionic Auxiliary Heart
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10943
|idx=92
|description=A titanium-plated love letter to Darwinism, ensuring you outlive your bad decisions through the magic of redundant organ engineering.
|skill=
|hp=2310
|def=207
|atk=256
|rush=151
|gene1=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +3%
|gene2=Restore 600 HP each round
|gene3=Water DMG +90
|gene4=Per 5000 Organ Score, {race} ATK +28
Current Organ Score: 50000/50000
|gene5=For Round 1, DMG +7.5%
|gene7=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
